raw_prior_scores.explain: Aligns strongly with platform-centric acquisition style, accelerating core platform adoption through strategic data asset integration to create an asymmetric AI advantage.
Fits the 'addressing customer adoption signals' preference but is a defensive, risk-mitigation play, less aligned with the proactive, strategic platform vision.
Direct feature competition is a distraction from the core goal of strengthening SAP's AI data foundation; misaligned with the strategic, platform-centric style.
